search_document:
User Request: Top revenue months.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend
Title: Top Customers by Revenue
Type: table
Description: Highest spending customers aggregated by region
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue for the selected period

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Customers by Revenue
sql_queries.description: Highest spending customers aggregated by region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CustomerID, c.CompanyName, c.Region, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.CompanyName, c.Region ORDER BY Revenue DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.description: Overall revenue for the selected period
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID
